title: lichen_l2.c: const cast discards qualifier
description:
firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c line 315 casts const uint8_t* to uint8_t* when calling net_if_set_link_addr:

  net_if_set_link_addr(iface, (uint8_t *)eui64, LICHEN_L2_ADDR_LEN, NET_LINK_UNKNOWN);

eui64 points to static storage in lora_state.eui64 (lora_l2.c line 55). The cast discards const and hands Zephyr a non-const pointer. If net_if_set_link_addr or any code using the stored pointer writes through it, behavior is undefined.

Fix: Either (a) make lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64() return non-const and document that the returned pointer is to mutable storage, or (b) copy eui64 to a local buffer before passing to net_if_set_link_addr.
